description: Systematic quality validation after DB insert. Runs the data_ingestion__post_validation.yaml checklist: NULL rate, duplicate rows, value-domain sanity, and tracking-column presence. Produces checklist_responses for check_checklist + check_traceability validators.

operation_id.description: Scope all checks to rows stamped with this operation_id (current batch).

tables_written.description: Tables to validate. Checklist items run per-table.

checklist_path.description: Defaults to shared/workflows/checklists/data_ingestion__post_validation.yaml. Override only for test fixtures.

checklist_responses.description: One entry per checklist item (pv-001 … pv-NNN). Consumed by check_checklist validator.

evidence.description: Plain-text evidence line. Must contain a token matching the checklist item's evidence_pattern regex.

overall_status.description: pass = all items pass. warn = at least one warn, no fail. fail = any fail (blocks workflow).

anomaly_report_path.description: Optional path to a detailed report if anomalies found. Written under {PROJECT_ROOT}/workspace/memos/ by convention.
